rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §25.154 governs student religious group activities in schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Students may organize prayer groups, religious clubs, "see you at the pole" gatherings, or other religious gatherings before, during, and after school to the same extent that students are permitted to organize other noncurricular student activities and groups.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
